name: Clariant Chemicals (India) Limited
summary: Clariant Chemicals (India) Limited manufactures and sells specialty chemicals in India and internationally. The company operates through two segments, Plastics and Coatings, and Specialty Chemicals. The Plastics and Coatings segment offers pigments, pigment preparations, additives, and masterbatches. The Specialty Chemicals segment provides dyestuffs, synthetic resins, functional effects and coatings, and auxiliaries and chemicals. It offers additives, such as flame retardants, waxes, performance additives, and surface solutions for functional effects in plastics, coatings, inks, and other special applications. The company also supplies catalysts for use in the chemicals, plastics, and oil and gas industries; provides bentonite for food and foundry industries; and offers industrial and consumer specialties comprising specialty chemicals and application solutions for the automotive fluid and coolant, aviation, construction chemical, agrochemical and agricultural adjuvant, food ingredient, gas treatment, heat transfer fluid, industrial lubricant additive, solvent, paints and coatings, and personal care, as well as home care, and industrial cleaning markets. In addition, it provides color and additive concentrates, and performance solutions for plastics; and solutions in the oil services, mining, and refinery services. Further, the company offers organic pigments, pigment preparations, and dyes for use in automotive industry and plastic industry, as well as industrial and architectural coatings; biotech and bio-based chemicals; electronic devices and components; food ingredients; VitiSphere encapsulated active ingredients for skincare; and 3D printing materials. The company was formerly known as Colour-Chem Limited and changed its name to Clariant Chemicals (India) Limited in 2006. Clariant Chemicals (India) Limited was founded in 1947 and is headquartered in Navi Mumbai, India.
